<section class="detail" id="ADHOCSUBPROCESS_CANCELREMAININGINSTANCES_PROPERTY">
<h3>ADHOCSUBPROCESS_CANCELREMAININGINSTANCES_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">ADHOCSUBPROCESS_CANCELREMAININGINSTANCES_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use AdHocSubProcessStereotype.CANCELREMAININGINSTANCES</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute is used only if ordering is parallel. It determines whether running instances are canceled when the completionCondition becomes true.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.ADHOCSUBPROCESS_CANCELREMAININGINSTANCES_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="ADHOCSUBPROCESS_COMPLETIONCONDITION_PROPERTY">
<h3>ADHOCSUBPROCESS_COMPLETIONCONDITION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">ADHOCSUBPROCESS_COMPLETIONCONDITION_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use AdHocSubProcessStereotype.COMPLETIONCONDITION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This Expression defines the conditions when the Process will end. When the Expression is evaluated to true, the Process will be terminated.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.ADHOCSUBPROCESS_COMPLETIONCONDITION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="ADHOCSUBPROCESS_ORDERING_PROPERTY">
<h3>ADHOCSUBPROCESS_ORDERING_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">ADHOCSUBPROCESS_ORDERING_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use AdHocSubProcessStereotype.ORDERING</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute defines if the Activities within the Process can be performed in parallel or MUST be performed sequentially. The default setting is parallel and the setting of sequential is a restriction on the performance that can be needed due to shared resources. When the setting is sequential, then only one Activity can be performed at a time. When the setting is parallel, then zero (0) to all the Activities of the Sub-Process can be performed in parallel.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.ADHOCSUBPROCESS_ORDERING_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="BPMNACTIVITY_COMPLETIONQUANTITY_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNACTIVITY_COMPLETIONQUANTITY_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNACTIVITY_COMPLETIONQUANTITY_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNActivityStereotype.COMPLETIONQUANTITY</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The default value is 1. The value MUST NOT be less than 1. This attribute defines the number of tokens that must be generated from the Activity. This number of tokens will be sent done any outgoing Sequence Flow (assuming any Sequence Flow Conditions are satisfied).
         Note that any value for the attribute that is greater than 1 is an advanced type of modeling and should be used with caution.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNACTIVITY_COMPLETIONQUANTITY_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="BPMNACTIVITY_DEFAULT_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNACTIVITY_DEFAULT_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNACTIVITY_DEFAULT_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNActivityStereotype.DEFAULT</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The Sequence Flow that will receive a token when none of the conditionExpressions on other outgoing Sequence Flows evaluate to true. The default Sequence Flow should not have a conditionExpression. Any such Expression SHALL be ignored.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNACTIVITY_DEFAULT_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="BPMNACTIVITY_ISFORCOMPENSATION_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNACTIVITY_ISFORCOMPENSATION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNACTIVITY_ISFORCOMPENSATION_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNActivityStereotype.ISFORCOMPENSATION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A flag that identifies whether this activity is intended for the purposes of compensation.
         If false, then this activity executes as a result of normal execution flow. If true, this activity is only activated when a Compensation Event is detected and initiated under Compensation Event visibility scope.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNACTIVITY_ISFORCOMPENSATION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="BPMNACTIVITY_RESOURCES_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNACTIVITY_RESOURCES_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNACTIVITY_RESOURCES_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNActivityStereotype.RESOURCES</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Defines the resource that will perform or will be responsible for the activity. The resource, e.g. a performer, can be specified in the form of a specific individual, a group, an organization role or position, or an organization.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNACTIVITY_RESOURCES_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="BPMNACTIVITY_STARTQUANTITY_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNACTIVITY_STARTQUANTITY_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNACTIVITY_STARTQUANTITY_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNActivityStereotype.STARTQUANTITY</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The default value is 1. The value MUST NOT be less than 1. This attribute defines the number of tokens that must arrive before the Activity can begin.
         Note that any value for the attribute that is greater than 1 is an advanced type of modeling and should be used with caution.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNACTIVITY_STARTQUANTITY_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="BPMNASSOCIATION_ASSOCIATIONDIRECTION_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNASSOCIATION_ASSOCIATIONDIRECTION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNASSOCIATION_ASSOCIATIONDIRECTION_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNAssociationStereotype.ASSOCIATIONDIRECTION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">associationDirection is an attribute that defines whether or not the Association shows any directionality with an arrowhead. The default is None (no arrowhead). A value of One means that the arrowhead SHALL be at the Target Object. A value of Both means that there SHALL be an arrowhead at both ends of the Association line.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNASSOCIATION_ASSOCIATIONDIRECTION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNPROCESS_CORRELATIONSUBSCRIPTIONS_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNProcessStereotype.CORRELATIONSUBSCRIPTIONS</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Correlation Subscriptions are a feature of context-based correlation. Correlation Subscriptions are used to correlate incoming Messages against data in the Process context. A
         Process MAY contain several correlationSubscriptions.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNPROCESS_CORRELATIONSUBSCRIPTIONS_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="BPMNPROCESS_DEFINTITIONALCOLLABORATIONREF_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNPROCESS_DEFINTITIONALCOLLABORATIONREF_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNPROCESS_DEFINTITIONALCOLLABORATIONREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNProcessStereotype.DEFINTITIONALCOLLABORATIONREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">For Processes that interact with other Participants, a definitional Collaboration can be referenced by the Process. The definitional Collaboration specifies the Participants the Process interacts with, and more specifically, which individual service, Send or Receive Task, or Message Event, is connected to which Participant through Message Flows. The definitional Collaboration need not be displayed.
         Additionally, the definitional Collaboration can be used to include Conversation information within a Process.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNPROCESS_DEFINTITIONALCOLLABORATIONREF_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="BPMNPROCESS_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNPROCESS_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNPROCESS_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNProcessStereotype.ISCLOSED</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Boolean value specifying whether interactions, such as sending and receiving Messages and Events, not modeled in the Process can occur when the Process is executed or performed. If the value is true, they MAY NOT occur. If the value is false, they MAY occur.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNPROCESS_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="BPMNPROCESS_PROCESSTYPE_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNPROCESS_PROCESSTYPE_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNPROCESS_PROCESSTYPE_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNProcessStereotype.PROCESSTYPE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The processType attribute Provides additional information about the level of abstraction modeled by this Process.
         A public Process shows only those flow elements that are relevant to external consumers. Internal details are not modeled. These Processes are publicly visible and can be used within a Collaboration. Note that the public processType was named abstract in BPMN 1.2.
         A private Process is one that is internal to a specific organization.
         An executable Process is a private Process that has been modeled for the purpose of being executed according to the semantics. Of course, during the development cycle of the Process, there will be stages where the Process does not have enough detail to be    executable.
         A non-executable Process is a private Process that has been modeled for the purpose of documenting Process behavior at a modeler-defined level of detail. Thus, information needed for execution, such as formal condition expressions are typically not included in a non-executable Process.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNPROCESS_PROCESSTYPE_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="BPMNPROCESS_RESOURCES_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNPROCESS_RESOURCES_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNPROCESS_RESOURCES_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNProcessStereotype.RESOURCES</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Defines the resource that will perform or will be responsible for the Process. The resource, e.g., a performer, can be specified in the form of a specific individual, a group, an organization role or position, or an organization.
         Note that the assigned resources of the Process does not determine the assigned resources of the Activities that are contained by the Process.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNPROCESS_RESOURCES_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

</dd>

</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="BPMNPROCESS_SUPPORTS_PROPERTY">
<h3>BPMNPROCESS_SUPPORTS_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">BPMNPROCESS_SUPPORTS_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNProcessStereotype.SUPPORTS</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Modelers can declare that they intend all executions or performances of one Process to also be valid for another Process. This means they expect all the executions or performances of the first Processes to also follow the steps laid out in the second Process.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.BPMNPROCESS_SUPPORTS_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="CHOREOGRAPHY_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY">
<h3>CHOREOGRAPHY_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ChoreographyStereotype.ISCLOSED</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Boolean value specifying whether Choreography Activities not modeled in the Choreography can occur when the Choreography is carried out. If the value is true, they MAY NOT occur. If the value is false, they MAY occur.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.CHOREOGRAPHY_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="block">A Choreography Activity has two (2) or more Participants</div>

<dd>

<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.CHOREOGRAPHYACTIVITY_PARTICIPANTREFS_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="COLLABORATION_CHOREOGRAPHYREF_PROPERTY">
<h3>COLLABORATION_CHOREOGRAPHYREF_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COLLABORATION_CHOREOGRAPHYREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CollaborationStereotype.CHOREOGRAPHYREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The choreographyRef model association defines a Choreography that is shown between the Pools of the Collaboration. A Choreography specifies a business contract (or the order in which messages will be exchanged) between interacting Participants.
         The participantAssociations (see below) are used to map the
         Participants of the Choreography to the Participants of the Collaboration. The choreographyMessageFlowAssociations (see below) are used to map the Message Flow of the Choreography to the Message Flow of the Collaboration.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COLLABORATION_CHOREOGRAPHYREF_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="COLLABORATION_CONVERSATIONASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY">
<h3>COLLABORATION_CONVERSATIONASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COLLABORATION_CONVERSATIONASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CollaborationStereotype.CONVERSATIONASSOCIATIONS</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute provides a list of mappings from the Conversations of a referenced Collaboration to the Conversations of another Collaboration.
         It is used when a Choreography is referenced by a Collaboration.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COLLABORATION_CONVERSATIONASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="COLLABORATION_CONVERSATIONS_PROPERTY">
<h3>COLLABORATION_CONVERSATIONS_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COLLABORATION_CONVERSATIONS_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CollaborationStereotype.CONVERSATIONS</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The conversations model aggregation relationship allows a Collaboration to contain Conversation elements, in order to group Message Flows of the Collaboration and associate correlation information, as is REQUIRED for the definitional Collaboration of a Process model. The Conversation elements will be visualized if the Collaboration is a Collaboration, but not for a Choreography.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COLLABORATION_CONVERSATIONS_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="COLLABORATION_CORRELATIONKEYS_PROPERTY">
<h3>COLLABORATION_CORRELATIONKEYS_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COLLABORATION_CORRELATIONKEYS_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CollaborationStereotype.CORRELATIONKEYS</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This association specifies CorrelationKeys used to associate Messages to a particular Collaboration.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COLLABORATION_CORRELATIONKEYS_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="COLLABORATION_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY">
<h3>COLLABORATION_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COLLABORATION_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CollaborationStereotype.ISCLOSED</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Boolean value specifying whether Message Flow not modeled in the Collaboration can occur when the Collaboration is carried out. If the value is true, they MAY NOT occur. If the value is false, they MAY occur.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COLLABORATION_ISCLOSED_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="COLLABORATION_MESSAGEFLOW_PROPERTY">
<h3>COLLABORATION_MESSAGEFLOW_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COLLABORATION_MESSAGEFLOW_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CollaborationStereotype.MESSAGEFLOW</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute provides a list of mappings for the Message Flow of the Collaboration to Message Flow of a referenced model. This applies for two (2) situations:
         - When a Choreography is referenced by the Collaboration.
         - When a Conversation is referenced by the Collaboration.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COLLABORATION_MESSAGEFLOW_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="COLLABORATION_MESSAGEFLOWASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY">
<h3>COLLABORATION_MESSAGEFLOWASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COLLABORATION_MESSAGEFLOWASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CollaborationStereotype.MESSAGEFLOWASSOCIATIONS</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute provides a list of mappings for the Message Flows of the Collaboration to Message Flows of a referenced model. It is used in the following situation:
         When a Choreography is referenced by a Collaboration. This allows the "wiring up" of the Collaboration Message Flows to the appropriate Choreography Activities.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COLLABORATION_MESSAGEFLOWASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="COLLABORATION_PARTICIPANTASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY">
<h3>COLLABORATION_PARTICIPANTASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COLLABORATION_PARTICIPANTASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CollaborationStereotype.PARTICIPANTASSOCIATIONS</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute provides a list of mappings from the Participants of a referenced. Collaboration to the Participants of another Collaboration. It is used in the following situations:
         When a Choreography is referenced by the Collaboration.
         When a definitional Collaboration for a Process is referenced through a Call Activity (and mapped to definitional Collaboration of the calling Process).</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COLLABORATION_PARTICIPANTASSOCIATIONS_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="COMPENSTATIONEVENTDEFINITION_ACTIVITYREF_PROPERTY">
<h3>COMPENSTATIONEVENTDEFINITION_ACTIVITYREF_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COMPENSTATIONEVENTDEFINITION_ACTIVITYREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CompenstationEventDefinitionStereotype.ACTIVITYREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">For a Start Event:
         This Event    catches    the compensation for an Event Sub-Process. No further information is required. The Event Sub-Process will provide the Id necessary to match the Compensation Event with the Event that threw the compensation, or the compensation will have been a broadcast.

         For an End Event:
         The Activity to be compensated MAY be supplied. If an Activity is not supplied, then the compensation is broadcast to all completed Activities in the current Sub-Process (if present), or the entire Process Instance (if at the global level).

         For an Intermediate Event within Normal Flow:
         The Activity to be compensated MAY be supplied. If an Activity is not supplied, then the compensation is broadcast to all completed Activities in the current Sub-Process (if present), or the entire Process Instance (if at the global level). This    throws    the compensation.

         For an Intermediate Event attached to the boundary of an Activity:
         This Event    catches    the compensation. No further information is required. The Activity the Event is attached to will provide the Id necessary to match the Compensation Event with the Event that threw the compensation, or the compensation will have been a broadcast.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COMPENSTATIONEVENTDEFINITION_ACTIVITYREF_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="COMPENSTATIONEVENTDEFINITION_WAITFORCOMPLETION_PROPERTY">
<h3>COMPENSTATIONEVENTDEFINITION_WAITFORCOMPLETION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">COMPENSTATIONEVENTDEFINITION_WAITFORCOMPLETION_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CompenstationEventDefinitionStereotype.WAITFORCOMPLETION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">For a throw Compensation Event, this flag determines whether the throw Intermediate Event waits for the triggered compensation to complete (the default), or just triggers the compensation and immediately continues</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.COMPENSTATIONEVENTDEFINITION_WAITFORCOMPLETION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ComplexGatewayStereotype.DEFAULT</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The Sequence Flow that will receive a Token when none of the
         conditionExpressions on other outgoing Sequence Flow evaluate to true. The default Sequence Flow should not have a conditionExpression. Any such Expression SHALL be ignored.</div>

<dt>See Also:</dt>

</section>
</li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="CONDITIONALSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">
<h3>CONDITIONALSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">CONDITIONALSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ConditionalStartEventStereotype.ISINTERRUPTING</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute only applies to Start Events of Event Sub-Processes; it is ignored for other Start Events. This attribute denotes whether the Sub-Process encompassing the Event Sub-Process should be canceled or not, If the encompassing Sub-Process is not canceled, multiple instances of the Event Sub-Process can run concurrently. This attribute cannot be applied to Error Events (where it   s always true), or Compensation Events (where it doesn   t apply).</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.CONDITIONALSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="deprecation-comment">use CorrelationPropertyBindingStereotype.DATAPATHBODY</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The Data path  defines the extraction rule from the Process
         context.
         The body of the Expression.
         Note that this attribute is not relevant when the XML Schema is used for interchange. Instead, the FormalExpression complex type supports mixed content. The body of the Expression would be specified as element content.</div>

<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>

<section class="detail" id="CORRELATIONPROPERTYRETRIEVALEXPRESSION_MESAGEPATHLANGUAGE_PROPERTY">

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-comment">use CorrelationPropertyRetrievalExpressionStereotype.MESAGEPATHLANGUAGE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The Message path  defines how to extract a CorrelationProperty from the Message payload. The language MUST be specified in a URI format.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.CORRELATIONPROPERTYRETRIEVALEXPRESSION_MESAGEPATHLANGUAGE_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="CORRELATIONPROPERTYRETRIEVALEXPRESSION_MESSAGEPATHBODY_PROPERTY">
<h3>CORRELATIONPROPERTYRETRIEVALEXPRESSION_MESSAGEPATHBODY_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">CORRELATIONPROPERTYRETRIEVALEXPRESSION_MESSAGEPATHBODY_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use CorrelationPropertyRetrievalExpressionStereotype.MESSAGEPATHBODY</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The Message path  defines how to extract a CorrelationProperty from the Message payload.
         The body of the Expression.
         Note that this attribute is not relevant when the XML Schema is used for interchange. Instead, the FormalExpression complex type supports mixed content. The body of the Expression would be specified as element content.</div>

<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.CORRELATIONPROPERTYRETRIEVALEXPRESSION_MESSAGEPATHBODY_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<section class="detail" id="DATAINPUT_ISCOLLECTION_PROPERTY">
<h3>DATAINPUT_ISCOLLECTION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use DataInputStereotype.ISCOLLECTION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Defines if the DataInput represents a collection of elements. It is needed when no itemDefinition is referenced. If an itemDefinition is referenced, then this attribute MUST have the same value as the isCollection attribute of the referenced itemDefinition. The default value for this attribute is false.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.DATAINPUT_ISCOLLECTION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="ERROR_ERRORCODE_PROPERTY">
<h3>ERROR_ERRORCODE_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">ERROR_ERRORCODE_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ErrorStereotype.ERRORCODE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">For an End Event:
         If the Result is an Error, then the errorCode MUST be supplied (if the processType attribute of the Process is set to executable) This    throws    the error.

         For an Intermediate Event within Normal Flow:
         If the Trigger is an Error, then the errorCode MUST be entered (if the processType attribute of the Process is set to executable). This    throws    the Error.

         For an Intermediate Event attached to the boundary of an Activity:
         If the Trigger is an Error, then the errorCode MAY be entered. This Event    catches    the error. If there is no errorCode, then any error SHALL trigger the Event. If there is an errorCode, then only an error that matches the errorCode SHALL trigger the Event.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.ERROR_ERRORCODE_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="ESCALATION_ESCALATIONCODE_PROPERTY">
<h3>ESCALATION_ESCALATIONCODE_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">ESCALATION_ESCALATIONCODE_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use EscalationStereotype.ESCALATIONCODE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">For an End Event:
         If the Result is an Escalation, then the escalationCode MUST be supplied (if the processType attribute of the Process is set to executable). This    throws    the escalation.

         For an Intermediate Event within Normal Flow:
         If the Trigger is an Escalation, then the escalationCode MUST be entered (if the processType attribute of the Process is set to executable). This    throws    the escalation.

         For an Intermediate Event attached to the boundary of an Activity:
         If the Trigger is an Escalation, then the escalationCode MAY be entered. This Event    catches    the escalation. If there is no escalationCode, then any escalation SHALL trigger the Event. If there is an escalationCode, then only
         an escalation that matches the escalationCode SHALL trigger the Event.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.ESCALATION_ESCALATIONCODE_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="ESCALATIONSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">
<h3>ESCALATIONSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">ESCALATIONSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use EscalationStartEventStereotype.ISINTERRUPTING</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute only applies to Start Events of Event Sub-Processes; it is ignored for other Start Events. This attribute denotes whether the Sub-Process encompassing the Event Sub-Process should be canceled or not, If the encompassing Sub-Process is not canceled, multiple instances of the Event Sub-Process can run concurrently. This attribute cannot be applied to Error Events (where it   s always true), or Compensation Events (where it doesn   t apply).</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.ESCALATIONSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="deprecation-comment">use EventBasedGatewayStereotype.EVENTGATEWAYTYPE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The eventGatewayType determines the behavior of the Gateway when
         used to instantiate a Process (as described above).
         The attribute can only be set to Parallel when the instantiate attribute
         is set to true.</div>

<dt>See Also:</dt>

</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ExclusiveGatewayStereotype.DEFAULT</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The Sequence Flow that will receive a Token when none of the conditionExpressions on other outgoing Sequence Flow evaluate to true. The default Sequence Flow should not have a conditionExpression. Any such Expression SHALL be ignored.</div>

<dd>

</section>
</li>

<section class="detail" id="GATEWAY_GATEWAYDIRECTION_PROPERTY">
<h3>GATEWAY_GATEWAYDIRECTION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">GATEWAY_GATEWAYDIRECTION_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use GatewayStereotype.GATEWAYDIRECTION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">An attribute that adds constraints on how the gateway may be used.
         Unspecified: There are no constraints. The Gateway may have any number of incoming and outgoing Sequence Flow.
         Converging: This Gateway may have multiple incoming Sequence Flow but must have no more than one outgoing SequenceFlow
         Diverging: This Gateway may have multiple outgoing Sequence Flow but must have no more than one incoming Sequence Flow
         Mixed: This Gateway contains multiple outgoing and multiple incoming Sequence Flow</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.GATEWAY_GATEWAYDIRECTION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ImportStereotype.IMPORTTYPE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Specifies the style of import associated with the element.
         For example, a value of    http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema    indicates that the
         imported element is an XML schema. A value of http://www.omg.org/bpmn20
         indicates that the imported element is a BPMN element.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.IMPORT_IMPORTTYPE_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>

<section class="detail" id="INCLUSIVEGATEWAY_DEFAULT_PROPERTY">

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use InclusiveGatewayStereotype.DEFAULT</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The Sequence Flow that will receive a Token when none of the
         conditionExpressions on other outgoing Sequence Flow evaluate to true. The default Sequence Flow should not have a conditionExpression. Any such Expression SHALL be ignored.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.INCLUSIVEGATEWAY_DEFAULT_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MESSAGESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MessageStartEventStereotype.ISINTERRUPTING</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute only applies to Start Events of Event Sub-Processes; it is ignored for other Start Events. This attribute denotes whether the Sub-Process encompassing the Event Sub-Process should be canceled or not, If the encompassing Sub-Process is not canceled, multiple instances of the Event Sub-Process can run concurrently. This attribute cannot be applied to Error Events (where it   s always true), or Compensation Events (where it doesn   t apply).</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MESSAGESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_BEHAVIOR_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_BEHAVIOR_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_BEHAVIOR_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.BEHAVIOR</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The attribute behavior acts as a shortcut for specifying when events shall be thrown from an Activity instance that is about to complete. It can assume values of none, one, all, and complex, resulting in the following behavior:
         - None: the EventDefinition which is associated through the noneEvent association will be thrown for each instance completing;
         - One: the EventDefinition referenced through the oneEvent association will be thrown upon the first instance completing;
         - All: no Event is ever thrown; a token is produced after completion of all instances
         - Complex: the complexBehaviorDefinitions are consulted to determine if and which Events to throw.
         For the behaviors of none and one, a default SignalEventDefinition will be thrown which automatically carries the current runtime attributes of the MI Activity. Any thrown Events can be caught by boundary Events on the Multi-Instance Activity.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_BEHAVIOR_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_COMPLETIONCONDITION_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_COMPLETIONCONDITION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_COMPLETIONCONDITION_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.COMPLETIONCONDITION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute defines a Boolean Expression that when evaluated to true, cancels the remaining Activity instances and produces a token.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_COMPLETIONCONDITION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_COMPLEXBEHAVIORDEFINTION_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_COMPLEXBEHAVIORDEFINTION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_COMPLEXBEHAVIORDEFINTION_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.COMPLEXBEHAVIORDEFINTION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Controls when and which Events are thrown in case behavior is set to complex.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_COMPLEXBEHAVIORDEFINTION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_INPUTDATAITEM_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_INPUTDATAITEM_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_INPUTDATAITEM_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.INPUTDATAITEM</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Data Input, representing for every Activity instance the single item of the collection stored in the loopDataInput. This Data Input can be the source of DataInputAssociation to a data input of the Activity   s InputOutputSpecification. The type of this Data Input MUST the scalar of the type defined for the loopDataInput.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_INPUTDATAITEM_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_ISSEQUENTIAL_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_ISSEQUENTIAL_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_ISSEQUENTIAL_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.ISSEQUENTIAL</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute is a flag that controls whether the Activity
         instances will execute sequentially or in parallel.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_ISSEQUENTIAL_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCARDINALITY_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCARDINALITY_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCARDINALITY_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.LOOPCARDINALITY</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A numeric Expression that controls the number of Activity instances that will be created. This Expression MUST evaluate to an integer.
         This may be underspecified, meaning that the modeler may simply document the condition. In such a case the loop cannot be formally executed.
         In order to initialize a valid multi-instance, either the
         loopCardinality Expression or the loopDataInput MUST be specified.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCARDINALITY_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCOUNTER_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCOUNTER_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCOUNTER_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.LOOPCOUNTER</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The LoopCounter attribute is used at runtime to count the number of loops and is automatically updated by the process engine.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCOUNTER_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPDATAINPUTREF_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPDATAINPUTREF_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPDATAINPUTREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.LOOPDATAINPUTREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A reference to a DataInput which is part of the Activity   s InputOutputSpecification. This DataInput is used to determine the number of Activity instances, one Activity instance per item in the collection of data stored in that DataInput element.
         In order to initialize a valid multi-instance, either the loopCardinality Expression or the loopDataInput MUST be specified.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPDATAINPUTREF_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPDATAOUTPUTREF_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPDATAOUTPUTREF_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPDATAOUTPUTREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.LOOPDATAOUTPUTREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This ItemAwareElement specifies the collection of data, which will be produced by the multi-instance.
         For Tasks it is a reference to a Data Output which is part of the Activity   s InputOutputSpecification.
         For Sub-Processes it is a reference to a collection-valued Data Object in the context that is visible to the Sub-Processes.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPDATAOUTPUTREF_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NONEBEHAVIOREVENTREF_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NONEBEHAVIOREVENTREF_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NONEBEHAVIOREVENTREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.NONEBEHAVIOREVENTREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The EventDefinition which is thrown when the behavior is set to none and an internal Activity instance has completed</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NONEBEHAVIOREVENTREF_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFACTIVEINSTANCES_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFACTIVEINSTANCES_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFACTIVEINSTANCES_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.NUMBEROFACTIVEINSTANCES</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute is provided for the outer instance of the Multi-Instance Activity only. This attribute contains the number of currently active inner instances for the Multi-Instance Activity. In case of a sequential Multi-Instance Activity, this value can   t be greater than 1. For parallel Multi-Instance Activities, this value can   t be greater than the value contained in numberOfInstances.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFACTIVEINSTANCES_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFCOMPLETEDINSTANCES_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.NUMBEROFCOMPLETEDINSTANCES</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute is provided for the outer instance of the Multi-Instance Activity only. This attribute contains the number of already completed inner instances for the Multi-Instance Activity.</div>
<dl class="notes">

<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFCOMPLETEDINSTANCES_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFTERMINATEDINSTANCES_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFTERMINATEDINSTANCES_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFTERMINATEDINSTANCES_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.NUMBEROFTERMINATEDINSTANCES</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute is provided for the outer instance of the Multi-Instance Activity only. This attribute contains the number of terminated inner instances for the Multi-Instance Activity. The sum of numberOfTerminatedInstances, numberOfCompletedInstances, and numberOfActiveInstances always sums up to numberOfInstances.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_NUMBEROFTERMINATEDINSTANCES_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_ONEBEHAVIOREVENTREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.ONEBEHAVIOREVENTREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The EventDefinition which is thrown when behavior is set to one and the first internal Activity instance has completed.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_ONEBEHAVIOREVENTREF_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_OUTPUTDATAITEM_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_OUTPUTDATAITEM_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_OUTPUTDATAITEM_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultiInstanceLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.OUTPUTDATAITEM</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Data Output, representing for every Activity instance the single item
         of the collection stored in the loopDataOutput. This Data Output can
         be the target of DataOutputAssociation to a data output of the
         Activity   s InputOutputSpecification. The type of this Data
         Output MUST the scalar of the type defined for the loopDataOutput.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIINSTANCELOOPCHARACTERISTICS_OUTPUTDATAITEM_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
