<section class="detail" id="MULTIPLEBOUNDARYEVENT_CANCELACTIVITY_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIPLEBOUNDARYEVENT_CANCELACTIVITY_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIPLEBOUNDARYEVENT_CANCELACTIVITY_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultipleBoundaryEventStereotype.CANCELACTIVITY</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Denotes whether the activity should be canceled or not, i.e., whether the boundary catch event acts as an error or an escalation. If the activity is not canceled, multiple instances of that handler can run concurrently.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIPLEBOUNDARYEVENT_CANCELACTIVITY_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<section class="detail" id="MULTIPLESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">
<h3>MULTIPLESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">MULTIPLESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use MultipleStartEventStereotype.ISINTERRUPTING</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute only applies to Start Events of Event Sub-Processes; it is ignored for other Start Events. This attribute denotes whether the Sub-Process encompassing the Event Sub-Process should be canceled or not, If the encompassing Sub-Process is not canceled, multiple instances of the Event Sub-Process can run concurrently. This attribute cannot be applied to Error Events (where it   s always true), or Compensation Events (where it doesn   t apply).</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.MULTIPLESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="PARALLELMULTIPLEBOUNDARYEVENT_CANCELACTIVITY_PROPERTY">
<h3>PARALLELMULTIPLEBOUNDARYEVENT_CANCELACTIVITY_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">PARALLELMULTIPLEBOUNDARYEVENT_CANCELACTIVITY_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ParallelMultipleBoundaryEventStereotype.CANCELACTIVITY</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Denotes whether the activity should be canceled or not, i.e., whether the boundary catch event acts as an error or an escalation. If the activity is not canceled, multiple instances of that handler can run concurrently.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.PARALLELMULTIPLEBOUNDARYEVENT_CANCELACTIVITY_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="PARALLELMULTIPLESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">
<h3>PARALLELMULTIPLESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">PARALLELMULTIPLESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ParallelMultipleStartEventStereotype.ISINTERRUPTING</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute only applies to Start Events of Event Sub-Processes; it is ignored for other Start Events. This attribute denotes whether the Sub-Process encompassing the Event Sub-Process should be canceled or not, If the encompassing Sub-Process is not canceled, multiple instances of the Event Sub-Process can run concurrently. This attribute cannot be applied to Error Events (where it   s always true), or Compensation Events (where it doesn   t apply).</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.PARALLELMULTIPLESTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="PARTICIPANT_MAXIMUM_PROPERTY">
<h3>PARTICIPANT_MAXIMUM_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">PARTICIPANT_MAXIMUM_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ParticipantStereotype.MAXIMUM</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The maximum attribute defines maximum number of Participants that MAY be involved in the Collaboration. The value of maximum MUST be one (1) or greater, AND MUST be equal or greater than the minimum value.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.PARTICIPANT_MAXIMUM_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="PARTICIPANT_MINIMUM_PROPERTY">

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ParticipantStereotype.MINIMUM</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The minimum attribute defines minimum number of Participants that MUST be involved in the Collaboration. If a value is specified in the maximum attribute, it MUST be greater or equal to this minimum value</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.PARTICIPANT_MINIMUM_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>

</section>
</li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="RECEIVETASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY">
<h3>RECEIVETASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">RECEIVETASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ReceiveTaskStereotype.IMPLEMENTATION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute specifies the technology that will be used to send and receive the Messages. Valid values are "##unspecified" for leaving the implementation technology open, "##WebService" for the Web service technology or a URI identifying any other technology or coordination protocol A Web service is the default technology</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.RECEIVETASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="RECEIVETASK_INSTANTIATE_PROPERTY">
<h3>RECEIVETASK_INSTANTIATE_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">RECEIVETASK_INSTANTIATE_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ReceiveTaskStereotype.INSTANTIATE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Receive Tasks can be defined as the instantiation mechanism for the Process with the instantiate attribute. This attribute MAY be set to true if the Task is the first Activity (i.e., there are no incoming Sequence Flows). Multiple Tasks MAY have this attribute set to true.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.RECEIVETASK_INSTANTIATE_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="RECEIVETASK_MESSAGEREF_PROPERTY">
<h3>RECEIVETASK_MESSAGEREF_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">RECEIVETASK_MESSAGEREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ReceiveTaskStereotype.MESSAGEREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Message for the messageRef attribute MAY be entered. This indicates that the Message will be received by the Task. The Message in this context is equivalent to an in-only message pattern (Web service). One or more
         corresponding incoming Message Flow MAY be shown on the diagram.
         However, the display of the Message Flow is not required. The Message is applied to all incoming Message Flow, but can arrive for only one of the incoming Message Flow for a single instance of the Task.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.RECEIVETASK_MESSAGEREF_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="RECEIVETASK_OPERATIONREF_PROPERTY">
<h3>RECEIVETASK_OPERATIONREF_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">RECEIVETASK_OPERATIONREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ReceiveTaskStereotype.OPERATIONREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute specifies the operation through which the Receive Task receives the Message.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.RECEIVETASK_OPERATIONREF_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="RENDERING_STEREOTYPE">
<h3>RENDERING_STEREOTYPE</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ScriptTaskStereotype.SCRIPT</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The modeler MAY include a script that can be run when the Task is performed. If a script is not included, then the Task will act as the equivalent of an Abstract Task.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.SCRIPTTASK_SCRIPT_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="deprecation-comment">use ScriptTaskStereotype.SCRIPTLANGUAGE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Defines the format of the script. This attribute value MUST be specified with a mime-type format. And it MUST be specified if a script is provided.</div>

<dd>

</section>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="SENDTASK_MESSAGEREF_PROPERTY">
<h3>SENDTASK_MESSAGEREF_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">SENDTASK_MESSAGEREF_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use SendTaskStereotype.MESSAGEREF</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Message for the messageRef attribute MAY be entered. This indicates that the Message will be sent by the Task. The Message in this context is equivalent to an out-only message pattern (Web service). One or more corresponding outgoing Message Flows MAY be shown on the diagram. However, the display of the Message Flows is NOT REQUIRED. The Message is applied to all outgoing Message Flows and the Message will be sent down all outgoing Message Flows at the completion of a single instance of the Task.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">

<li>
<section class="detail" id="SEQUENCEFLOW_ISIMMEDIATE_PROPERTY">
<h3>SEQUENCEFLOW_ISIMMEDIATE_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">SEQUENCEFLOW_ISIMMEDIATE_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use SequenceFlowStereotype.ISIMMEDIATE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">An optional boolean value specifying whether Activities or Choreography Activities not in the model containing the Sequence Flow can occur between the elements connected by the Sequence Flow. If the value is true, they MAY NOT occur. If the value is false, they MAY occur. Also see the isClosed attribute on Process, Choreography, and Collaboration. When the attribute has no value, the default semantics depends on the kind of model containing Sequence Flows:
         - For non-executable Processes (public Processes and non-executable private Processes) and Choreographies no value has the same semantics as if the value were false.
         - For an executable Processes no value has the same semantics as if the value were true.
         - For executable Processes, the attribute MUST NOT be false.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.SEQUENCEFLOW_ISIMMEDIATE_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="SERVICETASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY">
<h3>SERVICETASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ServiceTaskStereotype.IMPLEMENTATION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute specifies the technology that will be used to send and receive the Messages. Valid values are "##unspecified" for leaving the implementation technology open, "##WebService" for the Web service technology or a URI identifying any other technology or coordination protocol. A Web service is the default technology.</div>

<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>

<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.SERVICETASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<section class="detail" id="SIGNALSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">
<h3>SIGNALSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">SIGNALSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use SignalStartEventStereotype.ISINTERRUPTING</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute only applies to Start Events of Event Sub-Processes; it is ignored for other Start Events. This attribute denotes whether the Sub-Process encompassing the Event Sub-Process should be canceled or not, If the encompassing Sub-Process is not canceled, multiple instances of the Event Sub-Process can run concurrently. This attribute cannot be applied to Error Events (where it   s always true), or Compensation Events (where it doesn   t apply).</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.SIGNALSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCONDITION_PROPERTY">
<h3>STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCONDITION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCONDITION_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use StandardLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.LOOPCONDITION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Boolean expression that controls the loop. The Activity will only loop as long as this condition is true. The looping behavior may be underspecified, meaning that the modeler may simply document the condition, in which case the loop cannot be formally executed.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCONDITION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCOUNTER_PROPERTY">
<h3>STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCOUNTER_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCOUNTER_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use StandardLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.LOOPCOUNTER</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The LoopCounter attribute is used at runtime to count the number of loops and is automatically updated by the process engine.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPCOUNTER_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPMAXIMUM_PROPERTY">
<h3>STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPMAXIMUM_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPMAXIMUM_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use StandardLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.LOOPMAXIMUM</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Serves as a cap on the number of iterations.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.STANDARDLOOPCHARACTERISTICS_LOOPMAXIMUM_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use StandardLoopCharacteristicsStereotype.TESTBEFORE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Flag that controls whether the loop condition is evaluated at the beginning (testBefore = true) or at the end (testBefore = false) of the loop iteration.</div>

</section>

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use SubProcessStereotype.TRIGGEREDBYEVENT</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A flag that identifies whether this Sub-Process is an Event Sub-Process.
         If false, then this Sub-Process is a normal Sub-Process.
         If true, the this Sub-Process is an Event Sub-Process and is subject to additional constraints.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.SUBPROCESS_TRIGGEREDBYEVENT_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="TIMEREVENTDEFINITION_TIMECYCLE_PROPERTY">
<h3>TIMEREVENTDEFINITION_TIMECYCLE_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">TIMEREVENTDEFINITION_TIMECYCLE_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use TimerEventDefinitionStereotype.TIMECYCLE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">If the trigger is a Timer, then a timeCycle MAY be entered. Timer attributes are mutually exclusive and if any of the other Timer attributes is set, timeCycle MUST NOT be set (if the isExecutable attribute of the Process is set to true). The return type of the attribute timeCycle MUST conform to the ISO-8601 format for recurring time interval representations.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.TIMEREVENTDEFINITION_TIMECYCLE_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use TimerEventDefinitionStereotype.TIMEDATE</div>
</div>
<div class="block">If the trigger is a Timer, then a timeDate MAY be entered. Timer attributes are mutually exclusive and if any of the other Timer attributes is set, timeDate MUST NOT be set (if the isExecutable attribute of the Process is set to true). The return type of the attribute timeDate MUST conform to the ISO-8601 format for date and time representations.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.TIMEREVENTDEFINITION_TIMEDATE_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>

</dd>

</section>
</li>

Timer attributes are mutually exclusive and if any of the other Timer attributes is set, timeDuration MUST NOT be set (if the isExecutable attribute of the Process is set to true). <section class="detail" id="TIMERSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">
<h3>TIMERSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static final</span> <span class="return-type"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">String</a></span> <span class="element-name">TIMERSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use TimerStartEventStereotype.ISINTERRUPTING</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute only applies to Start Events of Event Sub-Processes; it is ignored for other Start Events. This attribute denotes whether the Sub-Process encompassing the Event Sub-Process should be canceled or not, If the encompassing Sub-Process is not canceled, multiple instances of the Event Sub-Process can run concurrently. This attribute cannot be applied to Error Events (where it   s always true), or Compensation Events (where it doesn   t apply).</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.TIMERSTARTEVENT_ISINTERRUPTING_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="TRANSACTION_METHOD_PROPERTY">

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use TransactionStereotype.METHOD</div>
</div>
<div class="block">TransactionMethod is an attribute that defines the technique that will be used to undo a Transaction that has been canceled. The default is compensate, but the attribute MAY be set to store or IMAGE.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.TRANSACTION_METHOD_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use TransactionStereotype.PROTOCOL</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The elements that make up the internal Sub-Process flow.
         This association is only applicable when the XSD Interchange is used. In the case of the XMI interchange, this association is inherited from the
         FlowElementsContainer class.</div>

</section>
</li>

<section class="detail" id="USERTASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY">
<h3>USERTASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use UserTaskStereotype.IMPLEMENTATION</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This attribute specifies the technology that will be used to implement the Business Rule Task. Valid values are "##unspecified" for leaving the implementation technology open, "##WebService" for the Web service technology or a URI identifying any other technology or coordination protocol. The default technology for this task is unspecified.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>See Also:</dt>
<dd>
<ul class="see-list">
<li><a href="../../../../../constant-values.html#com.nomagic.magicdraw.cbm.profiles.BPMN2Profile.USERTASK_IMPLEMENTATION_PROPERTY">Constant Field Values</a></li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<section class="detail" id="getAdHocSubProcess()">
<h3>getAdHocSubProcess</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getAdHocSubProcess</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).adHocSubProcess().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">An Ad-Hoc Sub-Process is a specialized type of Sub-Process that is a group of Activities that have no required sequence relationships. A set of activities can be defined for the Process, but the sequence and number of performances for the Activities is determined by the performers of the Activities.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="getAssignment()">
<h3>getAssignment</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getAssignment</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).assignment().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The Assignment class is used to specify a simple mapping of data elements using a specified expression language.
         The default expression language for all expressions is specified in the Definitions element, using the expressionLanguage attribute. It can also be overridden on each individual Assignment using the same attribute.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="getAuditing()">
<h3>getAuditing</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getAuditing</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).auditing().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">The Auditing element and its model associations allow defining attributes related to auditing. It leverages the BPMN extensibility mechanism. This element is used by FlowElements and Process. The actual definition of auditing attributes is out of scope of this specification. BPMN 2.0 implementations may define their own set of attributes and their intended semantics.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isAuditing(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isAuditing</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isAuditing</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use AuditingStereotype.isInstance(element)</div>
</div>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getBPMNActivity()">
<h3>getBPMNActivity</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getBPMNActivity</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).bpmnActivity().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">An Activity is work that is performed within a Business Process. An Activity can be atomic or non-atomic (compound). The types of Activities that are a part of a Process are: Task, Sub-Process, and Call Activity, which allows the inclusion of re-usable Tasks and Processes in the diagram. However, a Process is not a specific graphical object. Instead, it is a set of graphical objects. The following sections will focus on the graphical objects Sub-Process and Task.
         Activities represent points in a Process flow where work is performed. They are the executable elements of a BPMN Process.
         The Activity class is an abstract element, sub-classing from FlowElement.
         Concrete sub-classes of Activity specify additional semantics above and beyond that defined for the generic Activity.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isBPMNActivity(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isBPMNActivity</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isBPMNActivity</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNActivityStereotype.isInstance(element)</div>
</div>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getBPMNArtifact()">
<h3>getBPMNArtifact</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getBPMNArtifact</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).bpmnArtifact().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">BPMN provides modelers with the capability of showing additional information about a Process that is not directly related to the Sequence Flow or Message Flow of the Process.
         At this point, BPMN provides three (3) standard Artifacts: Associations, Groups, and a Text Annotations. Additional Artifacts may be added to the BPMN specification in later versions. A modeler or modeling tool may extend a BPMN diagram and add new types of Artifacts to a Diagram.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isBPMNArtifact(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isBPMNArtifact</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isBPMNArtifact</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNArtifactStereotype.isInstance(element)</div>
</div>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getBPMNAssociation()">
<h3>getBPMNAssociation</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getBPMNAssociation</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).bpmnAssociation().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">An Association is used to associate information and Artifacts with Flow Objects. Text and graphical non-Flow Objects can be associated with the Flow Objects and Flow. An Association is also used to show the Activity used for compensation.
         An Association is used to connect user-defined text (an Annotation) with a Flow Object</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isBPMNAssociation(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isBPMNAssociation</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isBPMNAssociation</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNAssociationStereotype.isInstance(element)</div>
</div>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getBPMNEvent()">
<h3>getBPMNEvent</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getBPMNEvent</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).bpmnEvent().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">An Event is something that    happens    during the course of a Process. These Events affect the flow of the Process and usually have a cause or an impact and in general require or allow for a reaction. The term    event    is general enough to cover many things in a Process. The start of an Activity, the end of an Activity, the change of state of a document, a Message that arrives, etc., all could be considered Events.
         Events allow for the description of    event-driven    Processes. In these Processes, There are three main types of Events:
         - Start Events, which indicate where a Process will start.
         - End Events, which indicate where a path of a Process will end.
         - Intermediate Events, which indicate where something happens somewhere between the start and end of a Process.

         Within these three types, Events come in two flavors:
         - Events that catch a Trigger. All Start Events and some Intermediate Events are catching Events.
         - Events that throw a Result. All End Events and some Intermediate Events are throwing Events that may eventually be caught by another Event. Typically the Trigger carries information out of the scope where the throw Event occurred into the scope of the catching Events. The throwing of a trigger may be either implicit as defined by this standard or an extension to it or explicit by a throw Event.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

</div>
<div class="block">A Message is used to depict the content of a communication between two Participants represented as Pools. In a Collaboration, the communication itself is represented by a Message Flow. In a Choreography, the communication is represented by a Choreography Task. The StructureDefinition is used to specify the Message
         structure.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="getBPMNProcess()">
<h3>getBPMNProcess</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getBPMNProcess</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).bpmnProcess().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Process describes a sequence or flow of Activities in an enterprise with the objective of carrying work. In BPMN a Process is depicted as a graph of Flow Elements, which are a set of Activities, Events, Gateways and Sequence Flow that define finite execution semantics. Processes can be defined at any level from enterprise-wide Processes to Processes performed by a single person. Low-level Processes can be grouped together to achieve a common business goal.
         Note that BPMN uses the term Process specifically to mean a set of flow elements. It uses the terms Collaboration and Choreography when modeling the interaction between Processes.

         A Process is a CallableElement, allowing it to be referenced and reused by other Processes via the Call Activity construct. In this capacity, a Process may reference a set of Interfaces that define its external behavior.
         A Process is a reusable element and can be imported and used within other Definitions.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isBPMNProcess(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isBPMNProcess</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isBPMNProcess</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use BPMNProcessStereotype.isInstance(element)</div>
</div>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getBPMNProperty()">
<h3>getBPMNProperty</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getBPMNProperty</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).bpmnProperty().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Properties, like Data Objects, are item-aware elements. But, unlike Data Objects, they are not visible within a Process diagram. Certain flow elements may contain properties, in particular only Processes, Activities and Events may contain Properties
         The Property class is a DataElement element that acts as a container for data associated with flow elements. Property elements must be contained within a FlowElement. Property elements are NOT visible in a Process diagram.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isBPMNProperty(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isBPMNProperty</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isBPMNProperty</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>

</div>

</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getBPMNRelationship()">
<h3>getBPMNRelationship</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getBPMNRelationship</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).bpmnRelationship().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">It is the intention of this specification to cover the basic elements required for the construction of semantically rich and syntactically valid Process models to be used in the description of Processes, Choreographies and business operations in multiple levels of abstraction. As the specification indicates, extension capabilities enable the enrichment of the information described in BPMN and supporting models to be augmented to fulfill particularities of a given usage model. These extensions intention is to extend the semantics of a given BPMN Artifact to provide specialization of intent or meaning.
         Process models do not exist in isolation and generally participate in larger, more complex business and system development Processes. The intention of the following specification element is to enable BPMN Artifacts to be integrated in these development Processes via the specification of a non-intrusive identity/relationship model between BPMN Artifacts and elements expressed in any other addressable domain model. The    identity/relationship    model it is reduced to the creation of families of typed relationships that enable BPMN and non-BPMN Artifacts to be related in non intrusive manner. By simply defining    relationship types    that can be associated with elements in the BPMN Artifacts and arbitrary elements in a given addressable domain model, it enables the extension and integration of BPMN models into larger system/development Processes.
         It is that these extensions will enable, for example, the linkage of    derivation    or    definition    relationships between UML artifacts and BPMN Artifacts in novel ways. So, a UML use case could be related to a Process element in the BPMN specification without affecting the nature of the Artifacts themselves, but enabling different integration models that traverse specialized relationships.
         Simply, the model enables the external specification of augmentation relationships between BPMN Artifacts and arbitrary relationship classification models, these external models, via traversing relationships declared in the external definition allow for linkages between BPMN elements and other structured or non-structured metadata definitions.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isBPMNRelationship(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">

 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>

</div>
</section>
</li>

<section class="detail" id="getBusinessRuleTask()">
<h3>getBusinessRuleTask</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getBusinessRuleTask</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).businessRuleTask().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Business Rule Task provides a mechanism for the Process to provide input to a Business Rules Engine
         and to get the output of calculations that the Business Rules Engine might provide. The InputOutputSpecification of the Task will allow the Process to send data to and receive data from the Business Rules Engine.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="getCallActivity()">
<h3>getCallActivity</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getCallActivity</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).callActivity().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Call Activity identifies a point in the Process where a global Process or a Global Task is used. The Call Activity acts as a    wrapper    for the invocation of a global Process or Global Task within the execution. The activation of a call Activity results in the transfer of control to the called global Process or Global Task.
         The BPMN 2.0 Call Activity corresponds to the Reusable Sub-Process of BPMN 1.2. A BPMN 2.0 Sub-Process corresponds to the Embedded Sub-Process of BPMN 1.2.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

</div>
</section>

<section class="detail" id="getCallChoreography()">
<h3>getCallChoreography</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getCallChoreography</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).callChoreography().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Call Choreography identifies a point in the Process where a global Choreography or a Global Choreography Task is used. The Call Choreography acts as a place holder for the inclusion of the Choreography element it is calling. This pre-defined called Choreography element
         becomes a part of the definition of the parent Choreography.
         A Call Choreography object shares the same shape as the Choreography Task and SubChoreography, which is a rectangle that has rounded corners, two (2) or more Participant Bands, and an Activity Name Band. However, the target of what the Choreography Activity calls will determine the details of its shape.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

</div>
</section>

<section class="detail" id="getCallableElement()">
<h3>getCallableElement</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getCallableElement</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).callableElement().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">CallableElement is the abstract super class of all Activities that have been defined outside of a Process
         or Choreography but which can be called (or reused) from within a Process or Choreography. It may
         reference Interfaces that define the service operations that it provides.
         Callable Elements are reusable elements, which can be imported and used in other Definitions.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<section class="detail" id="getCancelBoundaryEvent()">
<h3>getCancelBoundaryEvent</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getCancelBoundaryEvent</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).cancelBoundaryEvent().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">This type of Intermediate Event is used within a Transaction Sub-Process. This type of Event MUST be attached to the boundary of a Sub-Process. It SHALL be triggered if a Cancel End Event is reached within the Transaction Sub-Process. It also SHALL be triggered if a
         Transaction Protocol    Cancel    message has been received while the Transaction is being performed.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="getChoreography()">
<h3>getChoreography</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getChoreography</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).choreography().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Choreography is a type of process, but differs in purpose and behavior from a standard BPMN Process. A standard Process, or an Orchestration Process, is more familiar to most process modelers and defines the flow of Activities of a specific PartnerEntity or organization. In contrast, Choreography formalizes the way business Participants coordinate their interactions. The focus is not on orchestrations of the work performed within these Participants, but rather on the exchange of information (Messages) between these Participants.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isChoreography(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isChoreography</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isChoreography</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ChoreographyStereotype.isInstance(element)</div>
</div>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getChoreographyActivity()">
<h3>getChoreographyActivity</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getChoreographyActivity</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).choreographyActivity().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Choreography Activity represents a point in a Choreography flow where an interaction occurs between two (2) or more Participants.
         The Choreography Activity class is an abstract element, sub-classing from FlowElement. When Choreography Activities are defined they are contained within a Choreography or a
         Choreography Sub-Process, which are FlowElementContainers (other FlowElementContainers are not allowed to contain Choreography Activities).</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isChoreographyActivity(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isChoreographyActivity</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isChoreographyActivity</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ChoreographyActivityStereotype.isInstance(element)</div>
</div>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getChoreographyDiagram()">
<h3>getChoreographyDiagram</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getChoreographyDiagram</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).choreographyDiagram().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">ChoreographyDiagram is a concrete DiagramDefinition that defines diagrams that reference a BPMN Choreography element as a context.
         A self-contained Choreography (no Pools or Orchestration) is a definition of the expected behavior, basically a procedural contract, between interacting Participants. While a normal Process exists within a Pool, a Choreography exists between Pools (or Participants).
         The Choreography looks similar to a private Business Process since it consists of a network of Activities, Events, and Gateways (see Figure 7-4). However, a Choreography is different in that the Activities are interactions that represent a set (1 or more) of Message exchanges, which involves two (2) or more Participants. In addition, unlike a normal Process, there is no central controller, responsible entity or observer of the Process.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isChoreographyDiagram(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isChoreographyDiagram</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isChoreographyDiagram</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ChoreographyDiagramStereotype.isInstance(element)</div>
</div>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getChoreographyTask()">
<h3>getChoreographyTask</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getChoreographyTask</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).choreographyTask().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">A Choreography Task is an atomic Activity in a Choreography Process. It represents an Interaction, which is a coherent set (1 or more) of Message exchanges between two (2) Participants. Using a Collaboration diagram to view these elements (see page 143 for more information on Collaboration), we
         would see the two (2) Pools representing the two (2) Participants of the Interaction (see Figure 12-7). The communication between the Participants is shown as a Message Flow.

         The interaction defined by a Choreography Task can be shown in an expanded format through a Collaboration diagram.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isChoreographyTask(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">

</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isChoreographyTask</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use ChoreographyTaskStereotype.isInstance(element)</div>
</div>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="getCollaboration()">
<h3>getCollaboration</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getCollaboration</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).collaboration().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">Collaborations is a collection of Participants shown as Pools, their interactions as shown by Message Flow, and may include
         Processes within the Pools and/or Choreographies between the Pools.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>
<section class="detail" id="isCollaboration(com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element)">
<h3>isCollaboration</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public static</span> <span class="return-type">boolean</span> <span class="element-name">isCollaboration</span><wbr/><span class="parameters">(@CheckForNull
 <a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/classes/mdkernel/Element.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel">Element</a> element)</span></div>

</div>
</section>

<li>
<section class="detail" id="getCollaborationDiagram()">
<h3>getCollaborationDiagram</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getCollaborationDiagram</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).collaborationDiagram().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">CollaborationDiagram is a concrete DiagramDefinition that defines diagrams that reference a BPMN Collaboration element as a context.
         A Collaboration depicts the interactions between two or more business entities. A Collaboration contains two (2) or more Pools, representing the Participants in the Collaboration. The Message exchange between the Participants is shown by a Message Flow that connects two (2) Pools (or the objects within the Pools). The Messages associated with the Message Flow may also be shown. The Collaboration can be shown as two or more public Processes communicating with each other. With a public Process, the Activities for the Collaboration participants can be considered the    touch-points    between the participants.  The corresponding internal (executable) Processes are likely to have much more Activity and detail than what is shown in the public Processes. Or a Pool may be empty, a    black box.    Choreographies may be shown    in between    the Pools as they bisect the Message Flow between the Pools. All combinations of Pools, Processes, and a Choreography are allowed in a Collaboration.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>
<li>

</div>
</section>
</li>

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="block">A Communication is an atomic element for a Conversation diagram. It represents a set of Message Flow grouped together based on a single CorrelationKey. A Communication will involve two (2) or more Participants.</div>

<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<section class="detail" id="getCompensationBoundaryEvent()">
<h3>getCompensationBoundaryEvent</h3>
<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
</span><span class="modifiers">public</span> <span class="return-type"><a href="../../../uml2/ext/magicdraw/mdprofiles/Stereotype.html" title="interface in com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles">Stereotype</a></span> <span class="element-name">getCompensationBoundaryEvent</span>()</div>
<div class="deprecation-block"><span class="deprecated-label">Deprecated.</span>
<div class="deprecation-comment">use getInstance(element).compensationBoundaryEvent().getStereotype()</div>
</div>
<div class="block">When attached to the boundary of an Activity, this Event is used to "catch" the Compensation Event, thus the Event marker MUST be unfilled (see figure on the right). The Event will be triggered by a thrown compensation targeting that Activity. When the Event is triggered, the Compensation Activity that is Associated to the Event will be performed.</div>
<dl class="notes">
<dt>Returns:</dt>
<dd>stereotype</dd>
</dl>
</section>
</li>

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>

<div class="member-signature"><span class="annotations"><a class="external-link" href="https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Deprecated.html" title="class or interface in java.lang">@Deprecated</a>
